revision.comment: Create template to get the full root page name of the given or the current page. Works correctly in namespaces with subpages disabled

Changed protection level for "[[Template:FULLROOTPAGENAME]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: Allowing template editors ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:FULLROOTPAGENAME]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting potentially corrupted lower level templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
1 revision imported from [[:en:Template:FULLROOTPAGENAME]]: Import new copy
1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
1 revision imported from [[:en:Template:FULLROOTPAGENAME]]: Import new copy
1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 6 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:FULLROOTPAGENAME]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23034089081|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23034168414|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FULLROOTPAGENAME here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FULLROOTPAGENAME for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>Ns has subpages | {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>NAMESPACE:{{{1}}}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>NAMESPACE}}}} }} 
  | {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#titleparts:{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>FULLPAGENAME}}}}|1}}
  | {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>FULLPAGENAME}}}}
}}<noinclude>

{{documentation}}

</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
